name: poll-widget-demo
visual_summary: The poll-widget-demo component is a demonstration of the PollWidget component in inline and popover modes. It presents a poll with options and a submit button, displaying the chosen option as a selected state and displaying the results of all votes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready demo component with the following characteristics:

Name: poll-widget-demo
Description: The poll-widget-demo component is a demonstration of the PollWidget component in inline and popover modes. It presents a poll with options and a submit button, displaying the chosen option as a selected state and displaying the results of all votes.
Style: card, bordered
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: poll, widget, demo, example

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
